features: 1 Baby Blue Tissue Paper Pom Pom
Baby Blue Pom Pom Decoration measures 40cm (16") in diameter
Adds radiant flair to a boy baby shower, bridal shower, Christening, boys birthday party or other special occasion
Hang pom pom from the ceiling, archways or windows, or combine with other tissue paper hanging decorations for a stunning visual effect

description: Product Description Transform your party room into a sensational celebration venue with this eye-catching Baby Blue Tissue Paper Pom Pom. Made of delicate tissue paper, this delightful hanging decoration is lightweight and can be hung easily from the ceiling or a doorway to bring style to any special occasion. Create a dazzling horizon over the entire celebration by hanging this tissue paper pom pom with matching honeycomb paper balls, decorative fans and streamers at varying lengths from the ceiling throughout the venue. Manufacturer's Description Celebrate with a burst of cool colour with this delightful Baby Blue Tissue Paper Pom-Pom. This Baby Blue tissue paper sphere looks fun and festive hanging from the ceiling, in a doorway, or layered with other hanging decorations, to create a colourful photo backdrop. This Hanging Baby Blue Pom-Pom decoration works well at a baby shower, bridal shower, birthday party, christening or outdoor party. Coordinate with other Baby Blue party supplies and party decorations for a truly charming impression. Baby Blue Tissue Paper Pom Pom measures 40cm (16") and is sold individually.
